fault_hypothesis: The bug is on line 73, where the condition `len(active) > limit` should be `len(active) >= limit`. This off-by-one error fails to throttle a new heartbeat when the window is exactly full.

constraints.intent: The check should correctly handle the boundary case where active heartbeats exactly match the limit.
If the action is allowed, the number of active heartbeats must be strictly less than the limit.
The number of active heartbeats should not be exactly at the limit when deciding whether to throttle.
An allowed action implies there was at least one slot available, so the remaining count cannot be zero.
